case_title: ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC VS. CINDY RONNELL HODGES ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS STREET, #406, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, CINDY RONNELL AN INDIVIDUAL
